Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Silent One]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Silent One is a warrior and bodyguard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The Silent One covers his mouth as a symbol of refusing to speak secrets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Silent One is a character near whom a body in black lay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Naberius has a Silent One that limps along beside him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent One is a protection or entity that Naberius uses.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Killing a Chronicler might involve fighting a Silent One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Silent One's eyes brushed past Shera’s tunnel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Silent One is associated with Naberius Clayborn.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — A Silent One is a role within the Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Silent Ones keep their mouths covered and carry weapons strapped all over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Silent Ones are present in the room.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — A Silent One is responsible for protecting a Chronicler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Silent One is a role performed by the Heads of the Witness’ Guild.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
